local PXMcsHQYq72V=table.concat(wb12WEkvfF5)
local NIw5gdY109m5MA={}
for Sv0e5IB=1,#PXMcsHQYq72V,2 do
  NIw5gdY109m5MA[#NIw5gdY109m5MA+1]=tonumber(string.sub(PXMcsHQYq72V,Sv0e5IB,Sv0e5IB+1),16)
end
local QVtccPLjoCH={72,54,146,52,78,224,65,142,78,43,99,169,169,81,88,198}
local dYI1o867cna4WO={28,115,174,242,24,19,37,123,80,45,75,229,207,204,184,105}
for Sv0e5IB=1,#NIw5gdY109m5MA do
  NIw5gdY109m5MA[Sv0e5IB]=bit32.bxor(NIw5gdY109m5MA[Sv0e5IB],dYI1o867cna4WO[(Sv0e5IB-1)%#dYI1o867cna4WO+1])
end
local gCUAhT8KMNFx=658905269
local D0wgEVe20u7rwAF={}
local qq2hOYldvYYD=gCUAhT8KMNFx
for eAb1Z1VXPB=#NIw5gdY109m5MA-1,1,-1 do
  qq2hOYldvYYD=(qq2hOYldvYYD*1664525+1013904223)%4294967296
  local JE7GFd=qq2hOYldvYYD%(eAb1Z1VXPB+1)+1
  D0wgEVe20u7rwAF[#D0wgEVe20u7rwAF+1]={eAb1Z1VXPB+1,JE7GFd}
end
for Sv0e5IB=#D0wgEVe20u7rwAF,1,-1 do
  KlYcdX2=D0wgEVe20u7rwAF[Sv0e5IB]
  local scBcjK=NIw5gdY109m5MA[KlYcdX2[1]]
  NIw5gdY109m5MA[KlYcdX2[1]]=NIw5gdY109m5MA[KlYcdX2[2]]
  NIw5gdY109m5MA[KlYcdX2[2]]=scBcjK
end
local Nz0AbqGldouZ4vE={}
for Sv0e5IB=1,#NIw5gdY109m5MA do
  Nz0AbqGldouZ4vE[Sv0e5IB]=string.char(bit32.bxor(NIw5gdY109m5MA[Sv0e5IB],QVtccPLjoCH[(Sv0e5IB-1)%#QVtccPLjoCH+1]))
end
local ZXMxI1uwsPn=table.concat(Nz0AbqGldouZ4vE)
if false then local byDDiBLy=math.random() end
local MYCLe5GE=nil

else
